Document 1: Edmonton is the capital of Alberta, Canada.
Edmonton serves as the northern anchor of the Calgary – Edmonton Corridor.
Document 2: Vaillancourt Fountain is a large fountain located in Justin Herman Plaza in San Francisco.
The fountain was designed with the freeway environment in mind, but it was built to bring people there.
Document 3: Wolf Point is the location at the confluence of the North, South and Main Branches of the Chicago River.
This fork in the river is historically important in the development of early Chicago.
